description: Random 6-character security identifier.
source: methbooks/mock_universe.py

description: Initial weight from base universe normalised to sum to 1.
source: methbooks/mock_universe.py

description: MSCI ESG Rating on a seven-point scale from AAA (best) to CCC (worst); companies must be BB or above to be eligible.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "2.2.1 ESG Ratings Eligibility"

description: MSCI Controversies Score on a 0-10 scale (0 = most severe); new candidates require >=3; existing constituents require >=1 at Annual Review.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "2.2.2 Controversies Score Eligibility"

description: True if the security is currently an index constituent; used for ranking priority and the relaxed controversies threshold.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "3.1.1 Updating the Eligible Universe"

description: Numeric ESG score (0-10) normalized by industry; used as tiebreaker in sector ranking after ESG Rating and constituent status.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "4.1 MSCI ESG Ratings"

description: Free float-adjusted market capitalization in USD; used for sector coverage calculation and as the final ranking tiebreaker.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "2.3 Index Construction"

description: GICS sector classification used to group securities for sector-level 50% cumulative ff-mcap coverage targeting.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "2.3 Index Construction"

description: True if the company is classified as Producer of firearms and small arms ammunition for civilian markets (Highly Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Aggregate revenue percentage from production and distribution of firearms or small arms ammunition for civilian use; threshold 5% (Highly Restrictive).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: True if the company manufactures tobacco products or grows or processes raw tobacco leaves (Highly Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Aggregate revenue percentage from production distribution retail supply and licensing of tobacco-related products; threshold 5% (Highly Restrictive).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue percentage from production of alcohol-related products; threshold 10% (Least Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue percentage from production of conventional weapons and components; threshold 10% (Least Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue percentage from ownership or operation of gambling-related business activities; threshold 10% (Least Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue percentage from ownership or operation of nuclear power plants; threshold 10% (Least Restrictive CBI screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue from thermal coal mining; combined with unconventional_oil_gas_revenue_pct must be below 5% aggregate (Fossil Fuel Extraction screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue from oil sands shale gas and coal bed methane; combined with thermal_coal_mining_revenue_pct must be below 5% aggregate (Fossil Fuel Extraction screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue from thermal coal-based power generation; threshold 5% (Thermal Coal Power screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Revenue from production of Palm Oil; threshold 5% (Palm Oil screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Aggregate revenue from arctic oil and gas production north of 66.5 degrees latitude; threshold 5% (Arctic Oil & Gas screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Current cumulative free float-adjusted market capitalization coverage of the GICS sector relative to the Parent Index sector; used for intra-review and quarterly addition gating.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "3.2 Quarterly Index Reviews"

description: Composite eligibility flag indicating the security passes all Section 2.2 criteria (ESG rating Controversies Score all CBI screens); used in event-driven and quarterly addition checks.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "3.3 Ongoing Event-Related Maintenance"

description: True if the security is screened out by any controversial business involvement criterion in Section 2.2.3 and Appendix II; used in quarterly deletion check.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "3.1.1 Updating the Eligible Universe"

description: True if the company has any tie to controversial weapons categories per MSCI BISR assessment (Most Restrictive screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: True if the company is involved in nuclear weapons manufacture or key enabling components (Highly Restrictive screen).
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "Appendix II: Controversial Business Involvement Criteria"

description: Within-sector rank integer (1 = highest priority) produced by ranking rule; consumed by the selection rule.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Selection_Indexes_Methodology_20251211.md section "3.1.2 Ranking of Eligible Securities"
